authoritative_token_parity.authority: Anthropic count_tokens on the canonical C and B1 requests is the BLOCKING authority; the deterministic whitespace-token proxy is advisory only.
authoritative_token_parity.block_rule: MEMORY_LENGTH_MISMATCH if abs_gap > 32 AND rel_gap > 20% (authoritative). Proxy stays a fast precheck; if proxy and authoritative disagree on the block decision -> block and investigate.
authoritative_token_parity.measurement: memory-only tokens = count_tokens(with-memory request) - count_tokens(identical no-memory base request)

B1.note: Occupancy parity enforced on ITEM COUNT. Rendered line/char bounded by the shared render budget and reported for audit; exact per-lesson line equality between DISTINCT lessons is infeasible without forbidden padding, so observed not blocked.
B1.occupancy: count-matched to C: inject EXACTLY C_item_count lessons from the deranged family by frozen ranking

rendered_token_gap_gate.rule: block only when rendered-token gap > abs_tol AND relative gap > rel_tol; dormant for empty slots (0 vs 0); token = whitespace-separated tokens of the rendered memory block (deterministic offline proxy)

first_memory_bearing_position.note: first same-family reuse: injects the lesson banked at position 2 (black-132, parser_normalization). The token-gap gate is implemented BEFORE this position (dormant for positions 0-2 whose slots are empty).

note: Pre-registered; authoritative count_tokens C/B1 memory-length gate added before the first content-bearing task (black-185, position 4).
principle: Per task, inject only accepted lessons from PRIOR tasks of the CURRENT task family (exact-family). C/D/B1 share one MemoryContext shape and one frozen render budget. An empty slot injects NOTHING (no @@MEM tag) uniformly, so C==A at the memory-block level when no relevant memory exists yet. The only difference across C/D/B1 is content/relevance, controlled for quantity.
